intro: Sneak into a famous vlogger's house, uncover his secrets, solve puzzles, and escape before he finds you.
description:
Discover the truth hidden behind a famous vlogger's online fame. What begins as curiosity quickly turns into a nightmare when the doors lock behind you and escape becomes your only goal.

Explore dark rooms, search for useful items, unlock new areas, and solve escape-room style puzzles. Hidden passages, secret compartments, strange mechanisms, and mysterious clues reveal the story of the house and its owner.

Stay out of sight and avoid the vlogger at all costs. He reacts to noise, patrols the house, and can appear when you least expect it. Hide, move carefully, and use your surroundings to survive.

Experience a mix of exploration, stealth, puzzles, and tense chase sequences. Every item may help you solve a challenge or open a path forward.

Features:

• Survival horror with stealth gameplay
• Escape-room inspired puzzles and challenges
• Explore a mysterious house filled with secrets
• Search for items and unlock new areas
• Hide from a dangerous and unpredictable pursuer
• Atmospheric horror with touches of humor and satire
• Story-driven adventure with unusual characters
• Multiple ways to approach survival and escape

Can you uncover the vlogger's secrets and find a way out?
